calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-11-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Gordon P. Crespo for Appellant/Defendant;
Kile Ozier for Respondent/Plaintiff;

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Kile Ozier testifies on his own behalf. No new documentary evidence is introduced to the Court.

Gordon P. Crespo testifies on behalf of Appellant/Defendant (his/her own behalf) . The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Group Exhibit A - Written response and appeal to small claims judugment dated 10-11-18 by Appellant.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Stumpf, Clerk: William Trupek, not reported (525)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-05-2018 Continued To Oct-11-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Judgment Entered
